clusters.justification: This cluster encapsulates broad emotional reactivity, valence processing, and physiological arousal states characteristically mediated by the anterior insula, medial prefrontal, and amygdalar co-activation patterns.
These terms delineate the computation of subjective value, incentive processing, and reward-based decision-making typically subserved by frontostriatal macro-circuits.
This cluster represents internally directed mentation, spanning self-referential thought and the appraisal of others' mental states, fundamentally anchored by the default mode network.
